name: Cathe's Crawfish Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the diced carrot, green onions, onion, minced garlic, parsley, thyme, bay leaf, dill, and cayenne. Cook until slightly browned.
3. Stir in tomato paste and Cognac; cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, cream, and grated cheese. Reserve 8 pieces of crawfish for decoration.
5. Add the remaining crawfish to the egg mixture and stir well.
6. Pour the filling into the pre-baked pie crust.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) until set and golden brown, about 35-40 minutes.
